responsibilities: Assess client technology landscapes to identify gaps and recommend digital transformation roadmaps aligned with business goals
Lead requirements gathering workshops with business and IT stakeholders to define scope for technology implementation projects
Evaluate and recommend enterprise software vendors and platforms based on client functional and technical requirements
Develop business cases quantifying ROI of proposed technology investments including cloud migration and system modernization
Manage cross-functional implementation teams to deliver enterprise system rollouts within scope, budget, and timeline
Design future-state business process flows that leverage new technology capabilities to improve operational efficiency
Support change management activities including training plans and communication strategies for technology adoption
Coordinate with client IT teams to ensure successful integration of new systems with existing technology infrastructure
